## [00:00 - 03:03]

We'll now be going into the sunset on Engaged Subscriber, aka the Breakup Flow. It's basically an automated series that helps clean your list on behalf of you without you having to do anything, except for set it up initially. And basically what this does is it gives people a chance to either A, unsubscribe, or B, re-engage. That should also hopefully increase the opens and click rates. And if people are not engaged, you kind of want them off your list anyways. They're adding no value. You're paying more money to have them on your list because you have to pay your email platform for every subscriber you have. That's one. This will also help increase your deliverability with email providers. So most email clients like Yahoo, Google, et cetera, they track how many recipients interact with an email from a domain. So if people are doing positive engagements, so things like opens, clicks, placed orders, those are all positive signals to Google and Yahoo and the other ISPs that people want to receive your email. However, if people are unengaged, they're not opening, they're unsubscribing, or they're marking a spam, Google, Yahoo, and these other companies will start deprioritizing your emails, which means you could go from being in the inbox or the promotions folders to something like potentially the spam folder. And lastly, this allows you to be more refined in your campaign content.

## [06:04 - 06:45]

So when you're sending content to people that want to hear from you, the performance will be better. And when you're sending emails to people that don't want to hear from you, it'll be worse. So effectively, you're going to ignore people that have been ignoring you. And now your action item is to review the deliverability checklist we have, which will help you figure out whether or not you should do the Sunset Unengaged Subscriber, or AKA the Breakup Series. And on my screen again, this is kind of the list that you'll see, where it will show you where you might be based off your open rates, your click rates, your bounce rates. So if you fall into the yellow or the red, I highly recommend doing the Sunset Unengaged Subscriber flow. And even if you're in the good, it probably just makes sense to keep doing it so that way you can stay in that level.
